name: ARCTIC Freezer 4U-SP5 - Server CPU Cooler for AMD SP5, 4U & UP, AMD EPYC, 2 x 120mm Fan, 300-3300RPM, 4-Pin PWM Connector, 10 Heatpipes, LGA6096
